members.name: CreateElement
members.signature: public RID CreateElement(int windowId, int role)
members.summary: Creates a new, empty accessibility element resource. [b]Note:[/b] An accessibility element is created and freed automatically for each [Node]. In general, this function should not be called manually.

members.name: CreateSubElement
members.signature: public RID CreateSubElement(RID parentRid, int role, int insertPos)
members.summary: Creates a new, empty accessibility sub-element resource. Sub-elements can be used to provide accessibility information for objects which are not [Node]s, such as list items, table cells, or menu items. Sub-elements are freed automatically when the parent element is freed, or can be freed early using the [method free_element] method.

members.name: CreateSubTextEditElements
members.signature: public RID CreateSubTextEditElements(RID parentRid, RID shapedText, float minHeight, int insertPos, bool isLastLine)
members.summary: Creates a new, empty accessibility sub-element from the shaped text buffer. Sub-elements are freed automatically when the parent element is freed, or can be freed early using the [method free_element] method. If [param is_last_line] is [code]true[/code], no trailing newline is appended to the text content. Set to [code]true[/code] for the last line in multi-line text fields and for single-line text fields.

members.name: ElementGetMeta
members.signature: public Variant ElementGetMeta(RID id)
members.summary: Returns the metadata of the accessibility element [param id].

members.name: ElementSetMeta
members.signature: public void ElementSetMeta(RID id, Variant meta)
members.summary: Sets the metadata of the accessibility element [param id] to [param meta].

members.name: FreeElement
members.signature: public void FreeElement(RID id)
members.summary: Frees the accessibility element [param id] created by [method create_element], [method create_sub_element], or [method create_sub_text_edit_elements].

members.name: GetWindowRoot
members.signature: public RID GetWindowRoot(int windowId)
members.summary: Returns the main accessibility element of the OS native window.

members.name: HasElement
members.signature: public bool HasElement(RID id)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param id] is a valid accessibility element.

members.name: IsSupported
members.signature: public bool IsSupported()
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if screen reader is support by this implementation.

members.name: SetWindowFocused
members.signature: public void SetWindowFocused(int windowId, bool focused)
members.summary: Sets the window focused state for assistive apps. [b]Note:[/b] This method is implemented on Linux, macOS, and Windows. [b]Note:[/b] Advanced users only! [Window] objects call this method automatically.

members.name: SetWindowRect
members.signature: public void SetWindowRect(int windowId, Rect2 rectOut, Rect2 rectIn)
members.summary: Sets window outer (with decorations) and inner (without decorations) bounds for assistive apps. [b]Note:[/b] This method is implemented on Linux, macOS, and Windows. [b]Note:[/b] Advanced users only! [Window] objects call this method automatically.

members.name: UpdateAddAction
members.signature: public void UpdateAddAction(RID id, int action, Callable callable)
members.summary: Adds a callback for the accessibility action (action which can be performed by using a special screen reader command or buttons on the Braille display), and marks this action as supported. The action callback receives one [Variant] argument, which value depends on action type.

members.name: UpdateAddChild
members.signature: public void UpdateAddChild(RID id, RID childId)
members.summary: Adds a child accessibility element. [b]Note:[/b] [Node] children and sub-elements are added to the child list automatically.

members.name: UpdateAddCustomAction
members.signature: public void UpdateAddCustomAction(RID id, int actionId, String actionDescription)
members.summary: Adds support for a custom accessibility action. [param action_id] is passed as an argument to the callback of [constant ACTION_CUSTOM] action.

members.name: UpdateAddRelatedControls
members.signature: public void UpdateAddRelatedControls(RID id, RID relatedId)
members.summary: Adds an element that is controlled by this element.

members.name: UpdateAddRelatedDescribedBy
members.signature: public void UpdateAddRelatedDescribedBy(RID id, RID relatedId)
members.summary: Adds an element that describes this element.

members.name: UpdateAddRelatedDetails
members.signature: public void UpdateAddRelatedDetails(RID id, RID relatedId)
members.summary: Adds an element that details this element.

members.name: UpdateAddRelatedFlowTo
members.signature: public void UpdateAddRelatedFlowTo(RID id, RID relatedId)
members.summary: Adds an element that this element flow into.

members.name: UpdateAddRelatedLabeledBy
members.signature: public void UpdateAddRelatedLabeledBy(RID id, RID relatedId)
members.summary: Adds an element that labels this element.

members.name: UpdateAddRelatedRadioGroup
members.signature: public void UpdateAddRelatedRadioGroup(RID id, RID relatedId)
members.summary: Adds an element that is part of the same radio group. [b]Note:[/b] This method should be called on each element of the group, using all other elements as [param related_id].

members.name: UpdateSetActiveDescendant
members.signature: public void UpdateSetActiveDescendant(RID id, RID otherId)
members.summary: Adds an element that is an active descendant of this element.

members.name: UpdateSetBackgroundColor
members.signature: public void UpdateSetBackgroundColor(RID id, Color color)
members.summary: Sets element background color.

members.name: UpdateSetBounds
members.signature: public void UpdateSetBounds(RID id, Rect2 rect)
members.summary: Sets element bounding box, relative to the node position.

members.name: UpdateSetBrailleLabel
members.signature: public void UpdateSetBrailleLabel(RID id, String name)
members.summary: Sets element accessibility label for Braille display.

members.name: UpdateSetBrailleRoleDescription
members.signature: public void UpdateSetBrailleRoleDescription(RID id, String description)
members.summary: Sets element accessibility role description for Braille display.

members.name: UpdateSetChecked
members.signature: public void UpdateSetChecked(RID id, bool checekd)
members.summary: Sets element checked state.

members.name: UpdateSetClassname
members.signature: public void UpdateSetClassname(RID id, String classname)
members.summary: Sets element class name.

members.name: UpdateSetColorValue
members.signature: public void UpdateSetColorValue(RID id, Color color)
members.summary: Sets element color value.

members.name: UpdateSetDescription
members.signature: public void UpdateSetDescription(RID id, String description)
members.summary: Sets element accessibility description.

members.name: UpdateSetErrorMessage
members.signature: public void UpdateSetErrorMessage(RID id, RID otherId)
members.summary: Sets an element which contains an error message for this element.

members.name: UpdateSetExtraInfo
members.signature: public void UpdateSetExtraInfo(RID id, String name)
members.summary: Sets element accessibility extra information added to the element name.

members.name: UpdateSetFlag
members.signature: public void UpdateSetFlag(RID id, int flag, bool value)
members.summary: Sets element flag.

members.name: UpdateSetFocus
members.signature: public void UpdateSetFocus(RID id)
members.summary: Sets currently focused element.

members.name: UpdateSetForegroundColor
members.signature: public void UpdateSetForegroundColor(RID id, Color color)
members.summary: Sets element foreground color.

members.name: UpdateSetInPageLinkTarget
members.signature: public void UpdateSetInPageLinkTarget(RID id, RID otherId)
members.summary: Sets target element for the link.

members.name: UpdateSetLanguage
members.signature: public void UpdateSetLanguage(RID id, String language)
members.summary: Sets element text language.

members.name: UpdateSetListItemCount
members.signature: public void UpdateSetListItemCount(RID id, int size)
members.summary: Sets number of items in the list.

members.name: UpdateSetListItemExpanded
members.signature: public void UpdateSetListItemExpanded(RID id, bool expanded)
members.summary: Sets list/tree item expanded status.

members.name: UpdateSetListItemIndex
members.signature: public void UpdateSetListItemIndex(RID id, int index)
members.summary: Sets the position of the element in the list.

members.name: UpdateSetListItemLevel
members.signature: public void UpdateSetListItemLevel(RID id, int level)
members.summary: Sets the hierarchical level of the element in the list.

members.name: UpdateSetListItemSelected
members.signature: public void UpdateSetListItemSelected(RID id, bool selected)
members.summary: Sets list/tree item selected status.

members.name: UpdateSetListOrientation
members.signature: public void UpdateSetListOrientation(RID id, bool vertical)
members.summary: Sets the orientation of the list elements.

members.name: UpdateSetLive
members.signature: public void UpdateSetLive(RID id, int live)
members.summary: Sets the priority of the live region updates.

members.name: UpdateSetMemberOf
members.signature: public void UpdateSetMemberOf(RID id, RID groupId)
members.summary: Sets the element to be a member of the group.

members.name: UpdateSetName
members.signature: public void UpdateSetName(RID id, String name)
members.summary: Sets element accessibility name.

members.name: UpdateSetNextOnLine
members.signature: public void UpdateSetNextOnLine(RID id, RID otherId)
members.summary: Sets next element on the line.

members.name: UpdateSetNumJump
members.signature: public void UpdateSetNumJump(RID id, float jump)
members.summary: Sets numeric value jump.

members.name: UpdateSetNumRange
members.signature: public void UpdateSetNumRange(RID id, float min, float max)
members.summary: Sets numeric value range.

members.name: UpdateSetNumStep
members.signature: public void UpdateSetNumStep(RID id, float step)
members.summary: Sets numeric value step.

members.name: UpdateSetNumValue
members.signature: public void UpdateSetNumValue(RID id, float position)
members.summary: Sets numeric value.

members.name: UpdateSetPlaceholder
members.signature: public void UpdateSetPlaceholder(RID id, String placeholder)
members.summary: Sets placeholder text.

members.name: UpdateSetPopupType
members.signature: public void UpdateSetPopupType(RID id, int popup)
members.summary: Sets popup type for popup buttons.

members.name: UpdateSetPreviousOnLine
members.signature: public void UpdateSetPreviousOnLine(RID id, RID otherId)
members.summary: Sets previous element on the line.

members.name: UpdateSetRole
members.signature: public void UpdateSetRole(RID id, int role)
members.summary: Sets element accessibility role.

members.name: UpdateSetRoleDescription
members.signature: public void UpdateSetRoleDescription(RID id, String description)
members.summary: Sets element accessibility role description text.

members.name: UpdateSetScrollX
members.signature: public void UpdateSetScrollX(RID id, float position)
members.summary: Sets scroll bar x position.

members.name: UpdateSetScrollXRange
members.signature: public void UpdateSetScrollXRange(RID id, float min, float max)
members.summary: Sets scroll bar x range.

members.name: UpdateSetScrollY
members.signature: public void UpdateSetScrollY(RID id, float position)
members.summary: Sets scroll bar y position.

members.name: UpdateSetScrollYRange
members.signature: public void UpdateSetScrollYRange(RID id, float min, float max)
members.summary: Sets scroll bar y range.

members.name: UpdateSetShortcut
members.signature: public void UpdateSetShortcut(RID id, String shortcut)
members.summary: Sets the list of keyboard shortcuts used by element.

members.name: UpdateSetStateDescription
members.signature: public void UpdateSetStateDescription(RID id, String description)
members.summary: Sets human-readable description of the current checked state.

members.name: UpdateSetTableCellPosition
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTableCellPosition(RID id, int rowIndex, int columnIndex)
members.summary: Sets cell position in the table.

members.name: UpdateSetTableCellSpan
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTableCellSpan(RID id, int rowSpan, int columnSpan)
members.summary: Sets cell row/column span.

members.name: UpdateSetTableColumnCount
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTableColumnCount(RID id, int count)
members.summary: Sets number of columns in the table.

members.name: UpdateSetTableColumnIndex
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTableColumnIndex(RID id, int index)
members.summary: Sets position of the column.

members.name: UpdateSetTableRowCount
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTableRowCount(RID id, int count)
members.summary: Sets number of rows in the table.

members.name: UpdateSetTableRowIndex
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTableRowIndex(RID id, int index)
members.summary: Sets position of the row in the table.

members.name: UpdateSetTextAlign
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTextAlign(RID id, int align)
members.summary: Sets element text alignment.

members.name: UpdateSetTextDecorations
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTextDecorations(RID id, bool underline, bool strikethrough, bool overline, Color color)
members.summary: Sets text underline/overline/strikethrough.

members.name: UpdateSetTextOrientation
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTextOrientation(RID id, bool vertical)
members.summary: Sets text orientation.

members.name: UpdateSetTextSelection
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTextSelection(RID id, RID textStartId, int startChar, RID textEndId, int endChar)
members.summary: Sets text selection to the text field. [param text_start_id] and [param text_end_id] should be elements created by [method create_sub_text_edit_elements]. Character offsets are relative to the corresponding element.

members.name: UpdateSetTooltip
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTooltip(RID id, String tooltip)
members.summary: Sets tooltip text.

members.name: UpdateSetTransform
members.signature: public void UpdateSetTransform(RID id, Transform2D transform)
members.summary: Sets element 2D transform.

members.name: UpdateSetUrl
members.signature: public void UpdateSetUrl(RID id, String url)
members.summary: Sets link URL.

members.name: UpdateSetValue
members.signature: public void UpdateSetValue(RID id, String value)
members.summary: Sets element text value.

values.name: ACTION_BLUR
values.summary: Blur action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_CLICK
values.summary: Single click action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_COLLAPSE
values.summary: Collapse action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_CUSTOM
values.summary: Custom action, callback argument is set to the integer action ID.

values.name: ACTION_DECREMENT
values.summary: Decrement action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_EXPAND
values.summary: Expand action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_FOCUS
values.summary: Focus action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_HIDE_TOOLTIP
values.summary: Hide tooltip action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_INCREMENT
values.summary: Increment action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_REPLACE_SELECTED_TEXT
values.summary: Replace text action, callback argument is set to [String] with the replacement text.

values.name: ACTION_SCROLL_BACKWARD
values.summary: Scroll backward action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_SCROLL_DOWN
values.summary: Scroll down action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollUnit].

values.name: ACTION_SCROLL_FORWARD
values.summary: Scroll forward action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_SCROLL_INTO_VIEW
values.summary: Scroll into view action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollHint].

values.name: ACTION_SCROLL_LEFT
values.summary: Scroll left action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollUnit].

values.name: ACTION_SCROLL_RIGHT
values.summary: Scroll right action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollUnit].

values.name: ACTION_SCROLL_TO_POINT
values.summary: Scroll to point action, callback argument is set to [Vector2] with the relative point coordinates.

values.name: ACTION_SCROLL_UP
values.summary: Scroll up action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollUnit].

values.name: ACTION_SET_SCROLL_OFFSET
values.summary: Set scroll offset action, callback argument is set to [Vector2] with the scroll offset.

values.name: ACTION_SET_TEXT_SELECTION
values.summary: Set text selection action, callback argument is set to [Dictionary] with the following keys: - [code]"start_element"[/code] accessibility element of the selection start. - [code]"start_char"[/code] character offset relative to the accessibility element of the selection start. - [code]"end_element"[/code] accessibility element of the selection end. - [code]"end_char"[/code] character offset relative to the accessibility element of the selection end.

values.name: ACTION_SET_VALUE
values.summary: Set value action, callback argument is set to [String] or number with the new value.

values.name: ACTION_SHOW_CONTEXT_MENU
values.summary: Show context menu action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: ACTION_SHOW_TOOLTIP
values.summary: Show tooltip action, callback argument is not set.

values.name: FLAG_BUSY
values.summary: Element content is not ready (e.g. loading).

values.name: FLAG_HIDDEN
values.summary: Element is hidden for accessibility tools.

values.name: FLAG_READONLY
values.summary: Element is text field with selectable but read-only text.

values.name: FLAG_TOUCH_PASSTHROUGH
values.summary: Element allows touches to be passed through when a screen reader is in touch exploration mode.

values.name: LIVE_ASSERTIVE
values.summary: Indicates that updates to the live region have the highest priority and should be presented immediately.

values.name: LIVE_OFF
values.summary: Indicates that updates to the live region should not be presented.

values.name: LIVE_POLITE
values.summary: Indicates that updates to the live region should be presented at the next opportunity (for example at the end of speaking the current sentence).

values.name: ROLE_CONTAINER
values.summary: Container element. Elements with this role are used for internal structure and ignored by screen readers.

values.name: ROLE_MENU_ITEM_CHECK_BOX
values.summary: Popup menu check button item element.

values.name: ROLE_MENU_ITEM_RADIO
values.summary: Popup menu radio button item element.

values.name: ROLE_REGION
values.summary: Region/landmark element. Screen readers can navigate between regions using landmark navigation.

values.name: ROLE_TEXT_RUN
values.summary: Unifor text run. Note: This role is used for internal text elements, and should not be assigned to nodes.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_BOTTOM_EDGE
values.summary: A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Bottom edge of the scroll container.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_BOTTOM_RIGHT
values.summary: A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Bottom-right edge of the scroll container.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_LEFT_EDGE
values.summary: A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Left edge of the scroll container.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_RIGHT_EDGE
values.summary: A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Right edge of the scroll container.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_TOP_EDGE
values.summary: A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Top edge of the scroll container.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_TOP_LEFT
values.summary: A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Top-left edge of the scroll container.

values.name: SCROLL_UNIT_ITEM
values.summary: The amount by which to scroll. A single item of a list, line of text.

values.name: SCROLL_UNIT_PAGE
values.summary: The amount by which to scroll. A single page.

constants.summary: Container element. Elements with this role are used for internal structure and ignored by screen readers.
